settings.warpify.description.en: Configure whether Warp attempts to “Warpify” (add support for blocks, input modes, etc) certain shells.
settings.warpify.description.zh: 配置 Warp 是否对某些 Shell 进行 Warpify 处理（添加块、输入模式等支持）。

settings.warpify.subshells_supported.en: Subshells supported: bash, zsh, and fish.
settings.warpify.subshells_supported.zh: 支持的子 Shell：bash、zsh 和 fish。
